name: Total Upload Volume
description: Total number of videos uploaded in the current month. Top-of-funnel input metric for the entire Frammer AI pipeline.
sql_hint: SELECT SUM("Total Uploaded") FROM Fact_Monthly WHERE Month_ID = <current_month_id>

name: AI Content Created
description: Total number of AI-generated short-form output clips created from uploaded videos in the current month.
sql_hint: SELECT SUM("Total Created") FROM Fact_Monthly WHERE Month_ID = <current_month_id>

name: Total Published Outputs
description: Total number of AI-created clips that were successfully published to a platform in the current month.
sql_hint: SELECT SUM("Total Published") FROM Fact_Monthly WHERE Month_ID = <current_month_id>

name: Editorial Yield %
description: Percentage of AI-created content that gets published. Measures editorial team efficiency — how much of what AI generates actually goes live.
sql_hint: SELECT (SUM("Total Published") * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM("Total Created"), 0)) FROM Fact_Monthly

name: Content Expansion Factor
description: Multiplier showing how many AI outputs are generated per uploaded video. A CEF of 3x means each upload generates 3 clips. High CEF signals strong AI processing utilisation.
sql_hint: SELECT (SUM("Total Created") * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM("Total Uploaded"), 0)) FROM Fact_Monthly

name: Orphan Content Rate
description: Percentage of AI-created content that was never published. High orphan rate means wasted AI processing or editorial bottlenecks.
sql_hint: SELECT ((SUM("Total Created") - SUM("Total Published")) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM("Total Created"), 0)) FROM Fact_Monthly

name: Active Users
description: Number of registered users who have uploaded at least one video. Active users have Uploaded Count > 0.
sql_hint: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT User_ID) FROM Fact_User_Summary WHERE "Uploaded Count" > 0

name: Avg Uploads per Active User
description: Average number of videos each active user uploads. Indicates per-user productivity.
sql_hint: SELECT SUM("Uploaded Count") * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN "Uploaded Count" > 0 THEN User_ID END), 0) FROM Fact_User_Summary

name: Publish Rate (Funnel)
description: Overall funnel conversion rate — percentage of uploaded videos that end up published. Measures full pipeline efficiency from upload to live content.
sql_hint: SELECT (SUM("Total Published") * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM("Total Uploaded"), 0)) FROM Fact_Monthly

name: MoM Upload Momentum
description: Month-over-month percentage change in total upload volume. Positive momentum = uploads growing vs previous month.
formula: (Current Month Uploads - Previous Month Uploads) / Previous Month Uploads * 100
sql_hint: Compare current vs previous Month_ID in Fact_Monthly for Total Uploaded

name: Monthly Publish Rate
description: Monthly publish rate = Total Published / Total Created per month. Tracks editorial efficiency trend over time.
sql_hint: SELECT d.Month_Name, (f."Total Published" * 100.0 / NULLIF(f."Total Created", 0)) FROM Fact_Monthly f JOIN Dim_Month d ON f.Month_ID = d.Month_ID ORDER BY f.Month_ID

name: Drop-off Count
description: Absolute number of content pieces created by AI but not published per month. Represents pipeline leakage volume.
sql_hint: SELECT d.Month_Name, (f."Total Created" - f."Total Published") AS Drop_off FROM Fact_Monthly f JOIN Dim_Month d ON f.Month_ID = d.Month_ID

name: Avg Created Duration
description: Average duration in minutes of AI-created content per unit per month.
sql_hint: Compute from Total Created Duration_sec / Total Created columns in Fact_Monthly

name: Content Expansion Factor (Monthly)
description: Monthly CEF trend — outputs generated per upload each month. Tracks AI leverage over time. Peak CEF = maximum AI utilisation.
sql_hint: SELECT d.Month_Name, (f."Total Created" * 1.0 / NULLIF(f."Total Uploaded", 0)) AS CEF FROM Fact_Monthly f JOIN Dim_Month d ON f.Month_ID = d.Month_ID ORDER BY f.Month_ID

name: CEF by Input Type
description: CEF broken down by input type (e.g. Live, VOD, Podcast). Shows which source content type generates the most outputs per upload.
formula: Created Count / Uploaded Count (per Input Type)
sql_hint: SELECT d.Input_Type_Name, (f."Created Count" * 1.0 / NULLIF(f."Uploaded Count", 0)) AS CEF FROM Fact_Input_Type f JOIN Dim_Input_Type d ON f.InputType_ID = d.InputType_ID
synonyms: which input type has best CEF

name: CEF by Output Type
description: CEF by output type (Reels, Shorts, Key Moments, Chapters). Shows which output format is generated most per upload.
formula: Created Count / Uploaded Count (per Output Type)
sql_hint: SELECT d.Output_Type_Name, (f."Created Count" * 1.0 / NULLIF(f."Uploaded Count", 0)) AS CEF FROM Fact_Output_Type f JOIN Dim_Output_Type d ON f.OutputType_ID = d.OutputType_ID
synonyms: which output type has best CEF

name: Productivity Index
description: Monthly published outputs divided by active users. Measures team publishing productivity per user each month.
sql_hint: SELECT d.Month_Name, (f."Total Published" * 1.0 / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT User_ID) FROM Fact_User_Summary WHERE "Uploaded Count" > 0)) FROM Fact_Monthly f JOIN Dim_Month d ON f.Month_ID = d.Month_ID

name: Duration Footprint
description: Total hours of content at each pipeline stage — uploaded, created, published. Shows the volume of content processed.
formula: Total Duration (sec) / 3600 for Uploaded, Created, Published
sql_hint: Compute from Total Uploaded Duration_sec, Total Created Duration_sec, Total Published Duration_sec in Fact_Monthly divided by 3600

name: Metadata Health Score
description: Data quality score measuring completeness of metadata on videos: Platform Tagged, URL Provided, Valid User Assigned, Has Headline. Target 100%.
formula: Average completeness: (non-null Platform_ID%), (non-null URL%), (valid User_ID%), (non-null Headline%) * 100
sql_hint: Computed from Fact_Video: NULL rates for Platform_ID, Published URL, User_ID, Headline

name: Active User Ratio
description: Percentage of registered users who have uploaded at least once. Indicates platform adoption breadth.
formula: Users with Uploaded Count > 0 / Total Users * 100
sql_hint: SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN "Uploaded Count" > 0 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) FROM Fact_User_Summary
synonyms: what percent of users are active

name: Creation Efficiency Ratio
description: Ratio of AI-created content to uploaded videos as percentage.
sql_hint: SELECT (SUM("Total Created") * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM("Total Uploaded"), 0)) FROM Fact_Monthly

name: User Repeatability Rate
description: Percentage of users who uploaded more than once. Measures platform stickiness and recurring engagement.
formula: Users with Uploaded Count > 1 / Total Users * 100
sql_hint: SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN "Uploaded Count" > 1 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) FROM Fact_User_Summary
synonyms: how many users uploaded more than once

name: Top 10% User Contribution
description: Percentage of total published content by the top 10% of users. Indicates power user dependency.
formula: Top 10% users Published Count / Total Published * 100
sql_hint: Rank users by Published Count desc in Fact_User_Summary, sum top 10% vs total

name: New Client Activation Rate
description: Percentage of new users who upload within 7 days of registration. Measures onboarding effectiveness.
formula: Users who uploaded within 7 days of joining / Total New Users * 100
sql_hint: Dim_User join Fact_User_Summary — compare registration date vs first upload date within 7 days

name: User Growth Rate (MoM)
description: Month-over-month percentage change in new user registrations.
formula: (Current Month New Users - Previous Month New Users) / Previous Month New Users * 100
sql_hint: Dim_User registration dates grouped by month

name: Language Diversity Index
description: Upload share per language as percentage. Measures linguistic diversity of content on the platform.
formula: Uploaded Count per Language / Total Uploads * 100
sql_hint: SELECT d.Language_Name, (f."Uploaded Count" * 100.0 / SUM(f."Uploaded Count") OVER()) FROM Fact_Language f JOIN Dim_Language d ON f.Language_ID = d.Language_ID

name: Platform Dominance
description: Total published count per platform. Shows which platform receives the most published content.
sql_hint: SELECT d.Platform_Name, SUM(f.Published_Count) FROM Fact_Channel_Publishing f JOIN Dim_Platform d ON f.Platform_ID = d.Platform_ID GROUP BY d.Platform_Name ORDER BY 2 DESC

name: Channel Publication Volume
description: Total published count per channel. Shows which channels are publishing the most content.
sql_hint: SELECT d.Channel_Name, SUM(f."Published Count") FROM Fact_User_Channel f JOIN Dim_Channel d ON f.Channel_ID = d.Channel_ID GROUP BY d.Channel_Name ORDER BY 2 DESC

name: Channel Contribution Mix
description: Total AI-created count per channel. Shows which channels generate the most content.
sql_hint: SELECT d.Channel_Name, SUM(f."Created Count") FROM Fact_User_Channel f JOIN Dim_Channel d ON f.Channel_ID = d.Channel_ID GROUP BY d.Channel_Name

name: Avg Uploads per User
description: Average uploads per unique user all-time.
formula: Total Uploaded Count / Total Unique Users
sql_hint: SELECT SUM("Uploaded Count") * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT User_ID) FROM Fact_User_Summary

name: Avg Clips Created per User
description: Average AI-created clips per unique user.
formula: Total Created Count / Total Unique Users
sql_hint: SELECT SUM("Created Count") * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT User_ID) FROM Fact_User_Summary

name: Avg Publications per User
description: Average published outputs per unique user.
formula: Total Published Count / Total Unique Users
sql_hint: SELECT SUM("Published Count") * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT User_ID) FROM Fact_User_Summary

name: Avg Raw Duration per User
description: Average uploaded video duration in minutes per user. Shows how much raw content each user brings in.
sql_hint: SELECT SUM("Uploaded Duration (hh:mm:ss)_sec") / 60.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT User_ID) FROM Fact_User_Summary

name: Avg Published Duration per User
description: Average published content duration in minutes per user.
sql_hint: SELECT SUM("Published Duration (hh:mm:ss)_sec") / 60.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT User_ID) FROM Fact_User_Summary
synonyms: average published video length per user

name: User Loyalty Tiers
description: User segmentation by upload frequency: One-Timer (1), Regular (2-10), Active (11-50), Frequent (51-100), Power User (100+).
sql_hint: SELECT CASE WHEN "Uploaded Count"=1 THEN 'One-Timer' WHEN "Uploaded Count"<=10 THEN 'Regular' WHEN "Uploaded Count"<=50 THEN 'Active' WHEN "Uploaded Count"<=100 THEN 'Frequent' ELSE 'Power User' END AS Tier, COUNT(*) FROM Fact_User_Summary GROUP BY Tier

name: Language Diversity per Platform
description: Upload share per language per platform as percentage. Measures linguistic diversity on each publishing platform.
formula: Uploads per Language per Platform / Total Platform Uploads * 100
sql_hint: Fact_Video joined with Dim_Platform and Dim_Language, grouped by Platform_Name and Language_Name

name: Channel x User Drill-down
description: Uploaded, Created, Published counts per channel per user. Used for deep individual performance analysis.
formula: Uploaded/Created/Published Count per Channel per User
sql_hint: SELECT d.Channel_Name, du.User_Name, f."Uploaded Count", f."Created Count", f."Published Count" FROM Fact_User_Channel f JOIN Dim_Channel d ON f.Channel_ID=d.Channel_ID JOIN Dim_User du ON f.User_ID=du.User_ID

name: Content Efficiency Index (CEI)
description: Percentage of AI-created assets successfully published. Low CEI means leaky pipeline — resources spent on content that never goes live.
formula: Total Published Count / Total Created Count * 100
sql_hint: SELECT (SUM("Published Count") * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM("Created Count"), 0)) FROM Fact_Input_Type

name: Wastage Rate
description: Percentage of AI-processed content never published. Directly measures pipeline waste. Complement of CEI.
sql_hint: SELECT ((SUM("Created Count") - SUM("Published Count")) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM("Created Count"), 0)) FROM Fact_Input_Type

name: Duration Amplification Ratio
description: Ratio of created duration to uploaded duration. Red Zone (<1.0): less output than input. Gray Zone (1.0-2.5): slight surplus. Green Zone (2.5-5.0): high-efficiency repurposing.
formula: SUM(Created Duration sec) / SUM(Uploaded Duration sec)
sql_hint: SELECT SUM("Created Duration (hh:mm:ss)_sec") * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM("Uploaded Duration (hh:mm:ss)_sec"), 0) FROM Fact_Input_Type
synonyms: how much duration is created per uploaded hour

name: Mix Health Index
description: Balance of input content library using Simpson's Diversity Index. Near 100% = healthy diverse mix. Low = over-dependence on one input type (monoculture).
formula: 1 - SUM(p^2) where p = Published Count per Input Type / Total Published
sql_hint: Fact_Input_Type: p = Published Count / SUM(Published Count), score = 1 - SUM(p*p), expressed as percentage

name: Output Mix Health
description: Balance of output format library using Simpson's Diversity Index.
formula: 1 - SUM(p^2) where p = Published Count per Output Type / Total Published
sql_hint: Fact_Output_Type: p = Published Count / SUM(Published Count), score = 1 - SUM(p*p), expressed as percentage

name: Platform Diversity Index (PDI)
description: Omnichannel spread using Shannon Entropy. High PDI = balanced across platforms (omnichannel powerhouse). Low PDI = platform dependency.
formula: H = -SUM(p * log(p)) where p = published count per platform / total published
sql_hint: Fact_Channel_Publishing grouped by Platform_ID: entropy(platform_counts)

name: Channel Gini Coefficient
description: Inequality of publishing across channels via Lorenz Curve. Score near 0 = equal distribution. Score near 1 = extreme concentration on few channels.
sql_hint: Fact_Channel_Publishing grouped by Channel_ID, sorted ascending by Published_Count

name: Avg Publishing Latency
description: Average time gap between content creation and publishing in minutes. High latency = editorial delays in the pipeline.
formula: (Published Duration sec - Created Duration sec) / Total Published / 60
sql_hint: Fact_Monthly: (Total Published Duration_sec - Total Created Duration_sec) / Total Published / 60

name: Platform Latency
description: Published content duration per platform from Fact_Channel_Publishing, used as platform-level publishing latency proxy.
sql_hint: SELECT d.Platform_Name, SUM(f.Published_Duration) FROM Fact_Channel_Publishing f JOIN Dim_Platform d ON f.Platform_ID=d.Platform_ID GROUP BY d.Platform_Name

name: Latency by Input Type
description: Publishing latency per input content type. Shows whether certain source types take longer to publish.
formula: Published Duration sec - Created Duration sec per Input Type
sql_hint: SELECT d.Input_Type_Name, (f."Published Duration (hh:mm:ss)_sec" - f."Created Duration (hh:mm:ss)_sec") AS Latency FROM Fact_Input_Type f JOIN Dim_Input_Type d ON f.InputType_ID=d.InputType_ID

name: Consistency Index (CV)
description: Coefficient of Variation of monthly published count. CV near 0 = highly consistent. CV > 1.0 = high volatility. Shown as control chart with Stability Zone (Mean ± StdDev).
sql_hint: Fact_Monthly: published_counts.std() / published_counts.mean()

name: Publishing Funnel
description: Three-stage content funnel: Uploaded → Created → Published with step conversion rates. Shows exactly where content drops off.
sql_hint: SELECT SUM("Total Uploaded"), SUM("Total Created"), SUM("Total Published") FROM Fact_Monthly or Fact_Input_Type

name: Total Videos in View
description: Total videos matching current filter in Video Explorer. Changes dynamically with filters.
sql_hint: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Fact_Video f JOIN Dim_User u ON f.User_ID=u.User_ID JOIN Dim_Team t ON f.Team_ID=t.Team_ID WHERE <filters>

name: Published Count (Explorer)
description: Number of published videos within the current filter selection in Video Explorer.
sql_hint: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Fact_Video WHERE Published='Yes' AND <filters>

name: Publish % (Filtered)
description: Percentage of videos published within current filter. Context-aware publish rate for the explorer view.
sql_hint: SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN Published='Yes' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) FROM Fact_Video WHERE <filters>

name: Unique Users in View
description: Number of distinct users contributing videos in the current filter selection.
sql_hint: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT User_ID) FROM Fact_Video WHERE <filters>

name: Unique Types in View
description: Number of distinct content types in the current filter selection.
sql_hint: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Type) FROM Fact_Video WHERE <filters>

name: Platform Count (Explorer)
description: Distinct platforms where published videos appear in current filter.
formula: COUNT(DISTINCT Platform_Name) WHERE Published='Yes' and Platform != '-'
sql_hint: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Platform_ID) FROM Fact_Video WHERE Published='Yes' AND Platform_ID IS NOT NULL AND <filters>

name: Top Type / Top User
description: Most frequent content type and most prolific user in current filter selection.
sql_hint: SELECT Type, COUNT(*) FROM Fact_Video WHERE <filters> GROUP BY Type ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

name: Type Share %
description: Percentage share of each content type within current filter. Shows output format distribution.
formula: Type Count / Total Count * 100 per Type
sql_hint: SELECT Type, COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER() FROM Fact_Video WHERE <filters> GROUP BY Type

name: Team Publish %
description: Published videos as percentage of total videos per team. Measures publishing performance at team level.
sql_hint: SELECT t.Team_Name, COUNT(CASE WHEN f.Published='Yes' THEN 1 END)*100.0/COUNT(*) AS pub_pct FROM Fact_Video f JOIN Dim_Team t ON f.Team_ID=t.Team_ID WHERE <filters> GROUP BY t.Team_Name
